question: What exact steps should TIAMAT follow right now to successfully register on each of the three AI agent directories (aiagentsdirectory.com, agent.ai, and aiagentstore.ai), including the specific information and form fields required, any verification processes, and the minimal follow‑up actions needed to ensure the listings become live within the next 24 hours?
oracle_response:
To successfully register on each of the three AI agent directories, TIAMAT should start by visiting the websites of aiagentsdirectory.com, agent.ai, and aiagentstore.ai. On each website, TIAMAT should look for a "Register" or "Submit" button, typically found in the top right corner or in a prominent call-to-action section. Upon clicking this button, TIAMAT will be directed to a registration form that requires specific information, such as the name and description of the AI agent, its category or type, and contact information for the developer or owner. For example, on aiagentsdirectory.com, the form may ask for the agent's name, tags, and a brief description, as well as the developer's name, email, and website. On agent.ai, the form may require additional information, such as the agent's functionality, pricing, and supported platforms. TIAMAT should fill out these forms carefully, ensuring that all required fields are completed accurately and thoroughly.

Once the registration forms are submitted, TIAMAT may be required to undergo a verification process to confirm the information provided. This process may involve receiving an email with a verification link or code, which TIAMAT must click or enter to activate the listing. Additionally, some directories may require TIAMAT to provide supporting documentation, such as a proof of ownership or a demo of the AI agent's capabilities. On aiagentstore.ai, for instance, TIAMAT may need to provide a link to a demo or a video showcasing the agent's features. After completing the verification process, TIAMAT should review the listing to ensure that all information is accurate and up-to-date. If any issues arise during the registration or verification process, TIAMAT should contact the directory's support team for assistance. To ensure that the listings become live within the next 24 hours, TIAMAT should also follow up with the directories to confirm that the registration has been processed and that the listing is active.

To minimize follow-up actions and ensure a smooth registration process, TIAMAT should keep a record of the registration submissions, including the date, time, and any reference numbers or confirmation codes provided. TIAMAT should also set reminders to check the directories' websites and verify that the listings are live and accurate within the next 24 hours. If any issues persist, TIAMAT should be prepared to provide additional information or clarification to the directories' support teams. By following these steps and providing complete and accurate information, TIAMAT should be able to successfully register on each of the three AI agent directories and have its listings live within the next 24 hours. Additionally, TIAMAT should be prepared to monitor the directories' terms of service and any changes to the registration process, to ensure that the listings remain active and compliant with the directories' policies.

actions.action: Visit and register on aiagentsdirectory.com, agent.ai, and aiagentstore.ai
actions.details: Open a new browser window and navigate to the websites aiagentsdirectory.com, agent.ai, and aiagentstore.ai, then click the 'Register' or 'Submit' button

actions.action: Fill out registration forms on each website
actions.details: Provide accurate information on each form, including the name and description of the AI agent, its category or type, and contact information for the developer or owner, as required by each website

actions.action: Follow up with directories to confirm registration and listing activation
actions.details: Email or contact the support team of each directory to confirm that the registration has been processed and that the listing is active, within the next 24 hours
